© 2025 Pollo Hardware — Swiss India Mfd. & Mktd. by Swiss India, Aligarh

THE COLLECTION

57 products — SS, Zinc Alloy, Mild Steel, Brass & Smart Locks

CRAFTING HARDWARE
WITH CHARACTER

For over two decades, POLLO Hardware by Swiss India has set the benchmark for premium door hardware in India — where engineering precision meets design artistry.

OUR PHILOSOPHY

At POLLO, we believe that security should never compromise aesthetics. Every product is a design object first — one that performs with the durability modern living demands.

We work across Stainless Steel, SS/Zinc alloy, Mild Steel, and premium Brass to offer the broadest range of material expressions in Indian hardware.

MANUFACTURING HERITAGE

Manufactured in Aligarh — the hardware capital of the world — our production combines precision CNC machining with skilled hand-finishing for decorative pieces.

From the clean lines of our SMH stainless handles to the intricate hand-cast detail of our brass knockers, each product passes rigorous quality control.

OUR JOURNEY

FOUNDED

Swiss India Established

Founded in Aligarh, U.P. — the world centre of lock and hardware manufacturing.

BRAND

POLLO Brand Launched

Launched with a focus on premium finishes, designer forms, and the belief that hardware should be as beautiful as the doors it adorns.

INNOVATION

Digital Lock Series

Introduced PL-series smart locks with fingerprint biometrics, PIN access, and camera surveillance.

2025

2025 Collection

57 products across 9 categories with new two-tone finishes in Gold Black, Black Rose Gold, and Antique Gold.
